---
name: Refactoring
about: Suggest a code improvement or restructuring with no behaviour change
title: "[Refactor] "
labels: refactor
assignees: ""
---

**What needs to be refactored?**
A clear description of the code, file, or pattern that needs restructuring.

**Why does it need refactoring?**
What problem does the current structure cause — readability, maintainability, scalability?

**Describe the proposed change**
What the code should look like after the refactor. Include file paths and structure where relevant.

**Checklist**

- [ ] No functionality changes
- [ ] All existing imports updated
- [ ] Linting and formatting passes
- [ ] Tested locally end to end after the change

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information, related files, or linked issues.
